phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sóller train platform is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde sale el tren a Sóller?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh SAH-leh el tren ah SOH-yair?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bus connection area is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la zona de autobuses?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah THOH-nah deh ow-toh-BOO-ses?

likely_response.local: Planta baja, salidas 5 y 6. Siga señales.
likely_response.pronunciation: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah sah-LEE-dahs Y SEE-gah seh-NYAH-lehs
likely_response.translation_en: Ground floor, exits 5 and 6. Follow signs.

responses.english: Ground floor, exits 5 and 6. Follow signs.
responses.phonetic: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah sah-LEE-dahs Y SEE-gah seh-NYAH-lehs
responses.local: Planta baja, salidas 5 y 6. Siga señales.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if tickets to Sóller are available now
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay billetes para Sóller ahora?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, AH-ee bee-YEH-tehs PAH-rah SOH-yehr ah-OH-rah?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there are tickets left for today.

responses.english: Yes, there are tickets left for today.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket machines are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están las máquinas de billetes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lahs MAH-kee-nahs deh bee-YEH-tehs?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del vestíbulo, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the lobby, on the right.

responses.english: At the back of the lobby, on the right.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Al fondo del vestíbulo, a la derecha.
